name: 3M™ Versatile Print Label Material 7323V, Bright Silver Polyester, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Versatile Print Label Material 7323V is a durable label material with a new topcoat formulation that works with more inks on more printing presses, including water-based flexographic inks on gloss labels.
benefits: Near zero edge bleed and high image sharpness
Run more jobs per batch on digital presses
Durable protection of variable data and barcodes
UL Component Recognition to UL969 Labeling and Marking Standard with many ink systems and print technologies*

discovery.title: 3M™ Versatile Print Label Material 7323V, Bright Silver Polyester, Roll, Config
